Published Works

Books by Dr. CA. Chethan Jayantha

Risk Management
Enterprise Risk Management Frameworks
A Comprehensive Guide

A rigorous yet accessible guide to designing and implementing ERM frameworks across organisations. Covers COSO, ISO 31000, and sector-specific applications with a focus on Indian regulatory and governance contexts. Essential reading for CAs, CFOs, and internal auditors.

Author Dr. CA. Chethan Jayantha
Available Amazon India
Buy on Amazon
Sustainable Finance · ESG
Sustainable Finance in Practice
A Practitioner's Guide to EU Taxonomy, CBAM, and Green Capital Strategy for Indian Finance Leaders

The definitive India-EU sustainability finance guide. Demystifies the EU Taxonomy's six environmental objectives, CBAM implications for Indian exporters, and green capital allocation — equipping CFOs, CAs, and finance leaders to navigate the global sustainability transition with confidence.

Series India–EU Sustainability
Edition First Edition 2026

About the Author

Dr. CA. Chethan Jayantha is a Chartered Accountant based in Bengaluru, India, with over two decades of experience spanning internal audit, FP&A, risk management, and strategic finance.

He is currently completing a doctoral thesis in economic geography, examining agglomeration dynamics and industrial cluster formation in Karnataka.

Ph.D FCA MBA MA MCom MPhil (Com) MPhil (Eco) LL.B B.Com AIII DISA DIRM CIA CRMA CS (Exe) CCSA
